# How to Stop Debt Collectors -- FDCPA Guide [2026] -- Howtostopdebtcollectors
> Stop debt collectors with these proven methods. FDCPA rights, cease letters, disputes, and when to consider bankruptcy. 2026 guide.

## About
howtostopdebtcollectors.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- How to Stop Debt Collectors -- FDCPA Guide [2026] -- Howtostopdebtcollectors: https://howtostopdebtcollectors.org/

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
